full_text:
Ma Su (Youchang) 馬謖 (幼常)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Su (馬謖), styledYouchang (幼常). Ma Liang’s younger brother. Executed by Zhuge Liang after his failure at Jie Ting. Ma Su was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Ma Su lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
